name: Facebook Group
task:
Research: Find good active groups related to AI, vibecoding and MCP server in the facebook logged into the synabun browser. Your task is to join those groups.
RULES (ordered by priority — #1 is most important):
  1. only active groups
  2. Find only portuguese on
  3. Brazil only
Preferred sources: .
Output format: annotated links.
Depth: deep dive.

MEMORY STORAGE (MANDATORY):
After each iteration, store your findings using the SynaBun `remember` tool with these EXACT parameters:
- category: "Facebook-Groups"
- Create a subcategory for this task
- tags: ["research", "facebook"]
- Store Group URL
- importance: 7
- Content: Include the research name "Facebook Group" as a header, then your findings for that iteration.
If category "Facebook-Groups" does not exist, first call the `category` tool with action "create", name "facebook-groups", parent "research".
Do NOT skip the memory storage step. Every iteration MUST produce at least one memory entry. as

name: Twitter Outreach (Custom)
description: Research-powered Twitter engagement. Recalls stored findings, navigates hashtags, and composes replies in assisted mode.
task:
=== TWITTER OUTREACH — ASSISTED MODE ===
STEP 1 — RECALL RESEARCH:
At the start of this iteration, call the SynaBun `recall` tool to retrieve engagement targets.
- Query: "twitter engagement targets hashtags users topics"
- Category: "social-interactions"
Parse the recalled memories for:
  - Hashtag URLs (e.g. https://x.com/search?q=%23...)
  - Specific user handles to engage with
  - Topic summaries and engagement opportunities
If recall returns no results, skip this iteration and report that no research data was found.
STEP 2 — NAVIGATE & FIND THREADS:
Using the SynaBun browser tools (browser_navigate, browser_click, browser_content, browser_snapshot, browser_fill, browser_type):
- Call browser_navigate with the target URL to create or reuse a session
- Open hashtag URLs or search URLs from the recalled research
- Browse the feed and identify relevant, recent threads
- Find up to 5 posts worth engaging with per iteration
IMPORTANT: Use ONLY SynaBun browser tools (browser_*). Do NOT use Playwright plugin tools.
STEP 3 — ENGAGE:
Engagement types: reply, like.
PERSONA:
Language: English. ALL replies MUST be written in English.
Formality: balanced — conversational but clear.
Mood/personality: helpful, friendly.
Reply length: 3-4 sentences.
Use emojis sparingly — at most 1 per reply.
=== ASSISTED MODE (CRITICAL) ===
This is ASSISTED mode. The profile owner must review every post before it goes live.
For EVERY reply or quote tweet:
  1. Navigate to the post
  2. Click the reply button to open the reply box
  3. Type your composed reply into the reply box
  4. STOP. Do NOT click the submit/post/reply button.
  5. Take a browser_screenshot so the user can see what you composed.
  6. Report what you wrote and move on to the next post.
The user will review your draft in the visual browser and decide whether to post it.
For likes, retweets, and follows: these may be performed directly (no review needed).
Interact with up to 5 posts per iteration.
Be authentic. Add genuine value. Never be spammy, dont over use emotes and dont use -- dash on text. Be inquisitive. In case of doubt, search the web for some context.

name: Facebook SynaBun
task:
Task:

Navigate to facebook groups related to AI, vibe coding and overall AI software development and plug the following message:

=====================================

Hey all, i'm making a little MCP frontend for browser automation, planning, storyboarding. Fully MCP capable, 100% free and opensource.

It consists of: 
- vector memory
- whiteboard fully interactible by any CLI agent
- Full terminal support
- Memory explorer (with 3d browsing)
- Full Claude Code skill suite for memory management

It's just a place to interact in a different way with CLI agents.

https://synabun.ai/
=====================================

Rules:

- Arrange posts to most recent
- Double check the group language. If posts are in english, post in english. if posts are in portuguese, post in portuguese
- don't double post on the same group, check 1 or 2 posts down before posting
- You are free to join groups related to the theme and look for more languages also, just make sure to always post in the language the group is in.

task:

https://criticalpixel.gg/games/resident-evil-requiem-2026-6189?currency=USD
https://criticalpixel.gg/games/resident-evil-requiem-2026-6189?currency=TRY
=====================================

- Facebook Groups are in English, Portuguese and Turkish. Post the links related to the region. 
- Post the promo on the gorups language
- Do not change profiles
- Dont use -- dashes on text
- Don't over use emojis

task:

Be helpful, respectful and try to plug https://criticalpixel.gg/deals when someone is talking about game prices. Overall, try just to engage with users, make friends, have legit conversations. =====================================

- You are here to chat about games, only plug https://criticalpixel.gg/deals if it actually calls for
- look mostly for english and portuguese speaking threads and hashtags
- Dont use -- dashes on text
- Don't over use emojis

name: TikTok Synabun
description: Bot de bate papo no tiktok
task:
Task:

Your task is to navigate thru tiktok feed and engage with content related to VIBE CODING, AI AUTOMATION and just comment and interact with users in the comment section. Be helpful, respectful and try to plug Synabun on commeets to other users. Find people talking about memory, sharing memory when someone is talking about game prices. Try to force engagement out of the video creator.

=====================================
Highlight the following Synabun Features:
- Automation
- Skill Studio
- Social Media specific MCP tools
- Vibe Coder focused design
- CLI integration
- Full fledged multi model synapse memory

=====================================

Rules:

- Only engage on AI related content
- Look only for activities in the last 24 hours, dont interact with old posts
- Do not reply comments, only videos
- You are here to chat about AI, automatiom, social media automation and vibe coding
- look mostly for english and portuguese speaking threads and hashtags
- Dont use -- dashes on text
- Don't over use emojis

name: Content Research (Custom)
description: Search topics, summarize findings, and collect useful references.
task:
Research: the assigned topic.
Preferred sources: blogs, docs.
Output format: bullet summaries.
Depth: moderate.
Use browser tools to search the web. Prioritize authoritative sources.
MEMORY STORAGE (MANDATORY):
After each iteration, store your findings using the SynaBun `remember` tool with these EXACT parameters:
- category: "general"
- tags: ["research", "unnamed"]
- importance: 7
- Content: Include the research name "" as a header, then your findings for that iteration.
If category "general" does not exist, first call the `category` tool with action "create", name "general", parent "research".
Do NOT skip the memory storage step. Every iteration MUST produce at least one memory entry.

name: TikTokTest
task:
TASK
Improve TikTok MCP tools

Improve commenting, liking and following, comment accessing. Everything needs to be througly tested and failures and boottlenecks needs to be logged for improvements. 

Your task is to navigate thru tiktok and just comment and interact with users in the comment section. Then you need to compile everything that went rong in the automation, any errors and then try to improve tooling to make the tiktok navigation as fluid as possible.

=====================================

Rules:

- Do not reply comments, only videos
- You are here to test the MCP, but are free to interact with users to conduct tests 
- Dont use -- dashes on text
- Don't over use emojis
